title: HBAM Multi-Omics Pipeline
description: Reproducible Python pipeline for computing High Burden Aging Muscle composite index from multi-omics data (mouse tissue + human organoids)

stories.title: Project Scaffolding
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject.toml exists with all dependencies (mudata, anndata, scanpy, mofapy2, pandas, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, gseapy, pybiomart, typer, pyyaml, loguru, pydantic, pytest)
src/hbam/__init__.py exists with __version__ string
All sub-package __init__.py files exist: data/, modality/, integration/, engine/, translate/, output/, utils/
.gitignore excludes data/raw/, data/processed/, results/, __pycache__, .env, *.egg-info
Directory stubs exist: data/raw/, data/processed/, data/external/, results/figures/, results/tables/, results/intermediate/, notebooks/, tests/test_data/
pip install -e . succeeds OR python -c 'import hbam' works

stories.title: Configuration System
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/config.py defines PipelineConfig with Pydantic BaseModel including nested DataConfig, QCConfig, NormConfig, ImputeConfig, IntegrationConfig, EngineConfig, TranslationConfig, OutputConfig
config/default.yaml contains all configurable parameters with sensible defaults
load_config(path) returns fully populated PipelineConfig
Invalid values (negative threshold, missing required fields) raise ValidationError
seed field exists at top level (default 42)

stories.title: Logging and Validation Framework
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/utils/logging.py has setup_logging(), log_step() context manager, log_filter() helper
src/hbam/utils/validation.py has validate_missingness(), validate_dimensions(), validate_gene_overlap(), validate_normalization(), ValidationGate class
ValidationResult dataclass has passed, message, metrics fields
ValidationGate raises PipelineValidationError on failure with all failure details

stories.title: Test Fixtures
acceptanceCriteria: tests/conftest.py has fixtures: make_proteomics_adata, make_spatial_adata, make_mudata, make_config
Fixtures produce valid AnnData/MuData objects with realistic structure
Fixtures are deterministic (same seed = same data)
pytest collects fixtures without error

stories.title: Multi-Format Data Loaders
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/data/loaders.py has load_maxquant(), load_diann(), load_matrix(), load_stereo_gem()
MaxQuant loader filters Reverse, Potential contaminant, Only identified by site rows
DIA-NN loader pivots long format to wide matrix correctly
CSV/TSV loader auto-detects separator and gene column
Stereo-seq GEM loader creates AnnData with spatial coordinates in .obsm['spatial']
All loaders produce consistent AnnData with .var['gene_names'] and .layers['raw']

stories.title: QC, Normalization, and Imputation
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/data/qc.py has filter_missingness(), filter_variance(), qc_report()
src/hbam/data/normalize.py has normalize_proteomics() (median centering before log2), normalize_spatial() (SCTransform/scran fallback), normalize_generic()
src/hbam/data/impute.py has detect_missingness_type(), impute_mnar() (MinProb), impute_mcar() (KNN), impute_auto()
Imputation mask stored in .layers['imputed_mask']
Raw values preserved in .layers['raw']
All filter operations log before/after counts
No NaN values remain after imputation pipeline

stories.title: Modality Analysis (Temporal, Spatial, Functional)
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/modality/temporal.py has run_temporal_analysis() with Kruskal-Wallis DE, BH-FDR correction, trend detection
src/hbam/modality/spatial.py has run_spatial_analysis() with spatial QC, pseudo-bulk aggregation, spatially variable gene detection
src/hbam/modality/functional.py has run_functional_analysis() with protein group resolution, GO annotation, Wilcoxon DE
Results stored in .var columns (pvalue, fdr, fold_change, trend)
Spatial analysis does NOT impute biological zeros

stories.title: Integration Layer (Orthologs, Alignment, Embedding)
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/integration/orthologs.py has load_ortholog_table(), map_orthologs(), harmonize_gene_names()
Ortholog mapping handles one-to-many with best-ortholog strategy
src/hbam/integration/align.py has align_genes(), scale_features(), report_alignment()
Gene alignment logs feature counts at each step and errors if overlap < min_overlap (default 1000)
src/hbam/integration/embed.py has embed_mofa(), embed_pca(), auto_select_embedding(), run_embedding()
Latent factors stored in .obsm, loadings in .varm
PCA fallback works when MOFA+ unavailable
Seed produces identical results across runs

stories.title: HBAM Engine (Gene Sets, Weights, Scoring, Bootstrap)
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/engine/gene_sets.py has load_genage(), load_msigdb_hallmark(), load_custom_gene_set(), categorize_genes(), refine_gene_sets()
src/hbam/engine/weights.py has compute_weights_mofa(), compute_weights_pca(), normalize_weights()
src/hbam/engine/score.py has compute_hbam_score(), validate_score_direction(), bootstrap_validate()
HBAM = dysfunction_score - maturation_score stored in .obs
Bootstrap validation: 5 iterations, 80% subsamples, Spearman correlation computed
Gene set source tracking (literature/data_driven/both)

stories.title: Translation Layer (Scores, Biomarkers, Clinical)
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/translate/sample_score.py has score_samples(), compare_conditions()
src/hbam/translate/biomarkers.py has select_biomarkers(), evaluate_panel(), optimize_panel_size()
src/hbam/translate/clinical.py has compute_effect_sizes(), discrimination_analysis(), generate_clinical_summary()
Biomarker panel selects top N genes by absolute HBAM weight
Clinical metrics include Cohen's d, AUC, sensitivity, specificity

stories.title: Output Layer (Figures, Tables, Style)
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/output/style.py has set_publication_style(), PALETTE (colorblind-safe), save_figure(), get_condition_colors()

src/hbam/output/figures.py generates all 10 figures: pipeline overview, QC summary, latent space UMAP, weight heatmap, HBAM distribution, pathway enrichment, volcano, correlation matrix, biomarker panel, integration diagnostic
src/hbam/output/tables.py has generate_summary_table(), generate_gene_table() saving CSV and LaTeX
All figures save as both PDF (vector) and PNG (300 DPI)
Figures use colorblind-safe palette throughout

stories.title: CLI and End-to-End Pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: src/hbam/cli.py has typer app with commands: run, qc, integrate, score, figures
src/hbam/pipeline.py has run_pipeline() orchestrating all modules with validation gates
Pipeline saves intermediate MuData after each phase
Seed control applied to numpy, random at pipeline entry
--dry-run flag validates config without executing
Pipeline runs end-to-end on synthetic test data without error

stories.title: Tests and Documentation
acceptanceCriteria: Test files exist: test_loaders.py, test_qc.py, test_integration.py, test_engine.py, test_output.py, test_pipeline.py
All tests pass with pytest
Edge case tests: high missingness rejection, single modality fallback, no ortholog overlap error
docs/pipeline.md covers installation, configuration reference, usage examples
README.md has project overview, quick start, and configuration
